prompt: Identify users who activated at least 2 subscriptions but have had NO new subscription in the last 180 days. List up to 10 such users with their name, engagement tier, last subscription date, and total lifetime value, sorted by lifetime value descending.
output:
```sql
SELECT
    u.name,
    u.engagement_tier,
    MAX(s.subscription_date) AS last_subscription_date,
    SUM(s.amount) AS total_lifetime_value
FROM users u
JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.user_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.engagement_tier
HAVING COUNT(s.subscription_id) >= 2
   AND MAX(s.subscription_date) < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days'
ORDER BY total_lifetime_value DESC
LIMIT 10;
```
